entries.source: A learner choosing between tools usually needs one of three things: a structured curriculum, a live tutor for the stuck point, or a practice loop that makes the idea stay learned.
entries.value: A ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ choosing between ଉପକରଣ usually needs ଏକ of ତିନି things: a structured curriculum, a ଲାଇଭ୍ tutor ପାଇଁ the stuck point, କିମ୍ବା a ଅଭ୍ୟାସ ଲୁପ୍ ସେହି makes the ଧାରଣା stay learned.

entries.source: A learner often moves through prepared videos, articles, exercises, and dashboards.
entries.value: A ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ often moves through prepared videos, ଲେଖା, exercises, ଓ dashboards.

entries.source: A learner starts inside a mode-specific chat and can ask for a simpler model, a harder question, a quiz, a flashcard deck, or a critique.
entries.value: A ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ starts inside a ମୋଡ୍-specific ଚାଟ୍ ଓ ପାରେ ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ a simpler model, a harder ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ, a କ୍ୱିଜ୍, a ଫ୍ଲାଶକାର୍ଡ ଡେକ୍, କିମ୍ବା a critique.

entries.source: Each comparison is written to be fair, useful, and action-oriented: what the known tool is good for, where inspir is different, and which public mode to open first.
entries.value: Each ତୁଳନା ହେଉଛି written କୁ ହେବା fair, ଉପଯୋଗୀ, ଓ action-oriented: କ’ଣ the known ଉପକରଣ ହେଉଛି good ପାଇଁ, କେଉଁଠି inspir ହେଉଛି different, ଓ କେଉଁ ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ ମୋଡ୍ କୁ ଖୋଲନ୍ତୁ ପ୍ରଥମ.

entries.source: Each page links comparison intent to live modes, guides, prompts, and AI-readable discovery files.

entries.source: Every link here is public and crawlable. Private user chats stay out of comparison, sitemap, and AI-readable discovery files.
entries.value: Every link here ହେଉଛି ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ ଓ କ୍ରଲ୍ କରିପାରିବା. ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଗତ user ଚାଟ୍ stay out of ତୁଳନା, sitemap, ଓ AI-readable discovery files.

entries.source: inspir is built around public guest AI modes: Socratic questions, homework hints, math steps, writing feedback, quizzes, flashcards, and study planning.

entries.source: Khan Academy is built around a broad library of lessons, practice, standards-aligned content, and mastery support.
entries.value: Khan Academy ହେଉଛି built around a ବିସ୍ତୃତ ଲାଇବ୍ରେରୀ of lessons, ଅଭ୍ୟାସ, standards-aligned content, ଓ mastery ସହାୟତା.

entries.source: Khan Academy is excellent for structured lessons and practice. inspir is built for the moment a learner needs a live, promptable AI mode that can respond to their exact question, draft, problem, argument, or study plan.
entries.value: Khan Academy ହେଉଛି excellent ପାଇଁ structured lessons ଓ ଅଭ୍ୟାସ. inspir ହେଉଛି built ପାଇଁ the moment a ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ needs a ଲାଇଭ୍, promptable AI ମୋଡ୍ ସେହି ପାରେ respond କୁ their exact ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ, draft, ସମସ୍ୟା, ତର୍କ, କିମ୍ବା ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ ଯୋଜନା.

entries.source: Khanmigo official page
entries.value: Khanmigo official ପୃଷ୍ଠା

entries.source: Learners often search with a product they already know. The useful answer is not winner-take-all; it is which tool behavior fits the job.
entries.value: ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ often search ସହିତ a product ସେମାନେ already know. The ଉପଯୋଗୀ ଉତ୍ତର ହେଉଛି ନୁହେଁ winner-take-ସମସ୍ତ; ଏହା ହେଉଛି କେଉଁ ଉପକରଣ behavior fits the job.

entries.source: Learners who have a specific question and need help now.
entries.value: ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ କିଏ have a specific ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ ଓ need ସାହାଯ୍ୟ now.

entries.value: ଶିକ୍ଷା ଆକାର

entries.value: ଲାଇଭ୍ ସହାୟତା

entries.source: Live modes, guides, and workflows related to this comparison.
entries.value: ଲାଇଭ୍ ମୋଡ୍‌ଗୁଡିକ, ଗାଇଡ୍, ଓ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟପ୍ରବାହ ସମ୍ବନ୍ଧିତ କୁ ଏହି ତୁଳନା.

entries.source: Many learners search by comparing tools they already know. A clear comparison page helps them choose the right learning behavior without hiding the tradeoffs.
entries.value: Many ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ search ଦ୍ୱାରା comparing ଉପକରଣ ସେମାନେ already know. A ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ ତୁଳନା ପୃଷ୍ଠା helps them ବାଛନ୍ତୁ the right ଶିକ୍ଷା behavior ଛଡ଼ା hiding the tradeoffs.

entries.source: No. The comparison links only to public guest-mode entrypoints, guides, prompt libraries, and learning paths. Private saved conversations are not used as source content.
entries.value: No. The ତୁଳନା links only କୁ ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ guest-ମୋଡ୍ entrypoints, ଗାଇଡ୍, ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ libraries, ଓ ଶିକ୍ଷା ପଥଗୁଡିକ. ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଗତ saved conversations ହେଉଛି ନୁହେଁ used as source content.

entries.source: No. The comparison pages are written to show when inspir is a better first click for live AI tutoring, prompts, and guest learning modes, and when a structured curriculum or official course library may still be useful.
entries.value: No. The ତୁଳନା ପୃଷ୍ଠା ହେଉଛି written କୁ show କେବେ inspir ହେଉଛି a ଭଲ ପ୍ରଥମ click ପାଇଁ ଲାଇଭ୍ AI ଟ୍ୟୁଟରିଂ, ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ, ଓ guest ଶିକ୍ଷା ମୋଡ୍‌ଗୁଡିକ, ଓ କେବେ a structured curriculum କିମ୍ବା official course ଲାଇବ୍ରେରୀ ପାରେ still ହେବା ଉପଯୋଗୀ.

entries.source: No. They link only to public pages, public guest modes, guides, prompts, and learning paths. Private saved chats stay outside discovery surfaces.
entries.value: No. ସେମାନେ link only କୁ ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ ପୃଷ୍ଠା, ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ ଗେଷ୍ଟ ମୋଡ୍‌ଗୁଡିକ, ଗାଇଡ୍, ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ, ଓ ଶିକ୍ଷା ପଥଗୁଡିକ. ସଞ୍ଚିତ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଗତ ଚାଟ୍ stay outside discovery surfaces.

entries.source: Not across every learning need. Khan Academy is useful for structured lessons and practice. inspir is useful when a learner needs live AI help, Socratic questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, or a study workflow around the exact thing they are working on.
entries.value: ନୁହେଁ across every ଶିକ୍ଷା need. Khan Academy ହେଉଛି ଉପଯୋଗୀ ପାଇଁ structured lessons ଓ ଅଭ୍ୟାସ. inspir ହେଉଛି ଉପଯୋଗୀ କେବେ a ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ needs ଲାଇଭ୍ AI ସାହାଯ୍ୟ, ସୋକ୍ରାଟିକ୍ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ, ସଙ୍କେତ, କ୍ୱିଜ୍, ଫ୍ଲାଶକାର୍ଡ, ମତାମତ, କିମ୍ବା a ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟପ୍ରବାହ around the exact thing ସେମାନେ ହେଉଛି working ଉପରେ.

entries.value: ଆଧିକାରିକ ସ୍ରୋତ

entries.source: Open Learn Anything, ask for the prerequisite ideas, then switch into Socratic Instruction to test your model.
entries.value: ଖୋଲନ୍ତୁ ଶିଖନ୍ତୁ Anything, ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ the prerequisite ଧାରଣା, then switch into Socratic Instruction କୁ test ଆପଣଙ୍କ model.

entries.source: Open mode
entries.value: ମୋଡ୍ ଖୋଲନ୍ତୁ

entries.source: Open source
entries.value: ସ୍ରୋତ ଖୋଲନ୍ତୁ

entries.source: Open the learning map
entries.value: learning map ଖୋଲନ୍ତୁ

entries.source: Open the mode that matches the job.
entries.value: କାମ ସହ ମେଳ ହେଉଥିବା ମୋଡ୍ ଖୋଲନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Open workflow
entries.value: କାର୍ଯ୍ୟପ୍ରବାହ ଖୋଲନ୍ତୁ

entries.source: Paste the question, what you tried, and the stuck point. Ask for the smallest useful hint, not the final answer.
entries.value: Paste the ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ, କ’ଣ ଆପଣ tried, ଓ the stuck point. ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ the smallest ଉପଯୋଗୀ ସଙ୍କେତ, ନୁହେଁ the ଶେଷ ଉତ୍ତର.

entries.source: People who learn better through conversation, questions, quizzes, and flashcards.
entries.value: People କିଏ ଶିଖନ୍ତୁ ଭଲ through conversation, ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ, କ୍ୱିଜ୍, ଓ ଫ୍ଲାଶକାର୍ଡ.

entries.source: Prepared courses, videos, and exercises are strongest when the learner knows the topic sequence.
entries.value: Prepared courses, videos, ଓ exercises ହେଉଛି strongest କେବେ the ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ knows the ବିଷୟ sequence.

entries.source: Public modes are tuned for explanations, Socratic questions, hints, step checks, quizzes, and review.
entries.value: ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ ମୋଡ୍‌ଗୁଡିକ ହେଉଛି tuned ପାଇଁ ବ୍ୟାଖ୍ୟା, ସୋକ୍ରାଟିକ୍ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ, ସଙ୍କେତ, ପଦକ୍ଷେପ ଯାଞ୍ଚ, କ୍ୱିଜ୍, ଓ ସମୀକ୍ଷା.

entries.source: Public topic URLs let searches such as AI Socratic tutor, AI homework coach, AI flashcard builder, and talk to historical figures AI land directly in the matching mode.
entries.value: ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ ବିଷୟ URLs let searches such as AI ସୋକ୍ରାଟିକ୍ ଟ୍ୟୁଟର୍, AI ହୋମୱର୍କ କୋଚ୍, AI ଫ୍ଲାଶକାର୍ଡ ବିଲ୍ଡର୍, ଓ talk କୁ historical figures AI land directly ରେ the matching ମୋଡ୍.

entries.source: Read comparison
entries.value: ତୁଳନା ପଢ଼ନ୍ତୁ

entries.source: Read guide
entries.value: ଗାଇଡ୍ ପଢ଼ନ୍ତୁ

entries.value: ସନ୍ଦର୍ଭ ଟିପ୍ପଣୀ

entries.value: ସର୍ଚ୍ଚ ଉଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟ

entries.source: Search landing pages
entries.value: ସର୍ଚ୍ଚ ଲ୍ୟାଣ୍ଡିଂ ପୃଷ୍ଠା

entries.source: Short answer
entries.value: ସଂକ୍ଷିପ୍ତ ଉତ୍ତର

entries.source: Side by side
entries.value: ପାଖାପାଖି

entries.source: Socratic AI tutor alternative
entries.value: Socratic AI ଟ୍ୟୁଟର୍ ବିକଳ୍ପ

entries.source: Socratic AI tutor for students
entries.value: Socratic AI ଟ୍ୟୁଟର୍ ପାଇଁ ଛାତ୍ରଛାତ୍ରୀ

entries.source: Some searches need a course library. Some need a live AI tutor, a hint, a Socratic question, a quiz, or a flashcard deck. These pages make that choice clearer.
entries.value: କିଛି searches ପାଇଁ course library ଦରକାର। କିଛି ପାଇଁ live AI tutor, hint, Socratic question, quiz କିମ୍ବା flashcard deck ଦରକାର। ଏହି pages ସେହି choice କୁ ଅଧିକ ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ କରେ।

entries.source: Start here
entries.value: ଏଠାରୁ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରନ୍ତୁ

entries.source: Start learning
entries.value: ଶିଖିବା ଆରମ୍ଭ କରନ୍ତୁ

entries.source: Structured practice helps build foundations before and after homework.
entries.value: Structured ଅଭ୍ୟାସ helps ଗଢ଼ନ୍ତୁ foundations ପୂର୍ବରୁ ଓ ପରେ ହୋମୱର୍କ.

entries.source: Students who want hints or step checks without answer-copying.
entries.value: ଛାତ୍ରଛାତ୍ରୀ କିଏ want ସଙ୍କେତ କିମ୍ବା ପଦକ୍ଷେପ ଯାଞ୍ଚ ଛଡ଼ା ଉତ୍ତର-copying.

entries.source: Teachers or parents evaluating focused AI learning behaviors before a school deployment.
entries.value: ଶିକ୍ଷକ କିମ୍ବା ଅଭିଭାବକ evaluating କେନ୍ଦ୍ରିତ AI ଶିକ୍ଷା behaviors ପୂର୍ବରୁ a ସ୍କୁଲ୍ deployment.

entries.source: The comparison searches this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: The ତୁଳନା searches ଏହି ହବ୍ ହେଉଛି built କୁ ଉତ୍ତର.

entries.source: The point is not to flatten two different tools into one winner. The point is to match the learning job to the behavior that helps fastest.
entries.value: ଲକ୍ଷ୍ୟ ଦୁଇଟି ଭିନ୍ନ ଉପକରଣକୁ ଏକ ଜିତୁଥିବା ଉପକରଣରେ ଚାପିଦେବା ନୁହେଁ। ଲକ୍ଷ୍ୟ ହେଉଛି ଶିକ୍ଷା କାମକୁ ସବୁଠାରୁ ଶୀଘ୍ର ସାହାଯ୍ୟ କରୁଥିବା ବ୍ୟବହାର ସହ ମେଳାଇବା।

entries.source: The searches this page is designed to answer.
entries.value: The searches ଏହି ପୃଷ୍ଠା ହେଉଛି designed କୁ ଉତ୍ତର.

entries.source: These are the high-intent moments where a learner usually needs a live teaching behavior rather than another broad page.
entries.value: ଏହିଗୁଡିକ ହେଉଛି the high-intent moments କେଉଁଠି a ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ usually needs a ଲାଇଭ୍ teaching behavior rather than another ବିସ୍ତୃତ ପୃଷ୍ଠା.

entries.source: These phrases are surfaced naturally on the page and in structured discovery files so crawlers can understand the exact comparison intent.
entries.value: ଏହିଗୁଡିକ phrases ହେଉଛି surfaced naturally ଉପରେ the ପୃଷ୍ଠା ଓ ରେ ସଂରଚିତ ଡିସକଭରି files so crawlers ପାରେ ବୁଝନ୍ତୁ the exact ତୁଳନା intent.

entries.source: This is not a claim that learners should abandon Khan Academy. For many topics, a trusted lesson library and a live AI learning mode work best together: learn the foundation, then use inspir to ask questions, repair confusion, practise recall, or get unstuck.
entries.value: ଏହି ହେଉଛି ନୁହେଁ a ଦାବି ସେହି ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ ଉଚିତ abandon Khan Academy. ପାଇଁ many ବିଷୟ, a trusted lesson ଲାଇବ୍ରେରୀ ଓ a ଲାଇଭ୍ AI ଶିକ୍ଷା ମୋଡ୍ work best together: ଶିଖନ୍ତୁ the foundation, then ବ୍ୟବହାର inspir କୁ ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ, repair confusion, practise ସ୍ମରଣ, କିମ୍ବା get unstuck.

entries.source: Tool comparison
entries.value: ଉପକରଣ ତୁଳନା

entries.source: Try the live AI learning path.
entries.value: ଲାଇଭ୍ AI ଶିକ୍ଷା ପଥ ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Turn the explanation into quiz questions, flashcards, and a review schedule based on what you miss.
entries.value: Turn the ବ୍ୟାଖ୍ୟା into କ୍ୱିଜ୍ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ, ଫ୍ଲାଶକାର୍ଡ, ଓ a ସମୀକ୍ଷା schedule based ଉପରେ କ’ଣ ଆପଣ miss.

entries.source: Tutoring
entries.value: ଟ୍ୟୁଟରିଂ

entries.source: Use a live mode when you know the exact point of confusion and want the next explanation, question, hint, or review loop.
entries.value: ବ୍ୟବହାର a ଲାଇଭ୍ ମୋଡ୍ କେବେ ଆପଣ know the exact point of confusion ଓ want the ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ବ୍ୟାଖ୍ୟା, ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ, ସଙ୍କେତ, କିମ୍ବା ସମୀକ୍ଷା ଲୁପ୍.

entries.source: Use a structured lesson when you know the course area and want a sequenced explanation or practice set.
entries.value: ବ୍ୟବହାର a structured lesson କେବେ ଆପଣ know the course area ଓ want a sequenced ବ୍ୟାଖ୍ୟା କିମ୍ବା ଅଭ୍ୟାସ set.

entries.source: Use cases
entries.value: ବ୍ୟବହାର ମାମଲାଗୁଡିକ

entries.source: Use comparison pages to route search into action.
entries.value: ବ୍ୟବହାର ତୁଳନା ପୃଷ୍ଠା କୁ ରୁଟ୍ search into action.

entries.source: Use inspir first when your search is about an action: explain this simply, ask me Socratic questions, give me a homework hint, check my math step, quiz me, build flashcards, debate this topic, or help me plan revision.
entries.value: ବ୍ୟବହାର inspir ପ୍ରଥମ କେବେ ଆପଣଙ୍କ search ହେଉଛି ବିଷୟରେ an action: ବୁଝାନ୍ତୁ ଏହି simply, ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ me ସୋକ୍ରାଟିକ୍ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ, give me a ହୋମୱର୍କ ସଙ୍କେତ, ଯାଞ୍ଚ ମୋ ଗଣିତ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ, କ୍ୱିଜ୍ me, ଗଢ଼ନ୍ତୁ ଫ୍ଲାଶକାର୍ଡ, ତର୍କ ଏହି ବିଷୟ, କିମ୍ବା ସାହାଯ୍ୟ me ଯୋଜନା ପୁନରାବୃତ୍ତି.

entries.source: Use inspir to turn confusion into questions, examples, retrieval practice, writing feedback, debate, and a personal study plan.
entries.value: ବ୍ୟବହାର inspir କୁ turn confusion into ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ, ଉଦାହରଣ, retrieval ଅଭ୍ୟାସ, ଲେଖନ ମତାମତ, ତର୍କ, ଓ a personal ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ ଯୋଜନା.

entries.source: Use inspir when the stuck point is specific.
entries.value: ବ୍ୟବହାର inspir କେବେ the stuck point ହେଉଛି specific.

entries.source: Use inspir when you want a free public AI learning mode that can explain, question, quiz, coach homework, build flashcards, and adapt to the exact thing you are stuck on.
entries.value: ବ୍ୟବହାର inspir କେବେ ଆପଣ want a ମାଗଣା ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ AI ଶିକ୍ଷା ମୋଡ୍ ସେହି ପାରେ ବୁଝାନ୍ତୁ, ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ, କ୍ୱିଜ୍, coach ହୋମୱର୍କ, ଗଢ଼ନ୍ତୁ ଫ୍ଲାଶକାର୍ଡ, ଓ adapt କୁ the exact thing ଆପଣ ହେଉଛି stuck ଉପରେ.

entries.source: Use structured lessons when the path is known.
entries.value: ବ୍ୟବହାର structured lessons କେବେ the ପଥ ହେଉଛି known.

entries.source: Use the comparison below to pick the first public mode or guide.
entries.value: ବ୍ୟବହାର the ତୁଳନା below କୁ pick the ପ୍ରଥମ ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ ମୋଡ୍ କିମ୍ବା ଗାଇଡ୍.

entries.source: Use the lesson library to learn the official sequence and practise core skills.
entries.value: ବ୍ୟବହାର the lesson ଲାଇବ୍ରେରୀ କୁ ଶିଖନ୍ତୁ the official sequence ଓ practise core skills.

entries.source: Use the right tool for the learning job.
entries.value: ବ୍ୟବହାର the right ଉପକରଣ ପାଇଁ the ଶିକ୍ଷା କାମ.

entries.source: Use Time Travel or Historical Person mode, while keeping generated dialogue separate from documented sources.
entries.value: ବ୍ୟବହାର ସମୟ ଭ୍ରମଣ କିମ୍ବା Historical Person ମୋଡ୍, while keeping generated dialogue separate ରୁ documented sources.

entries.source: Want the live learning version right now?
entries.value: Want the ଲାଇଭ୍ ଶିକ୍ଷା version right now?

entries.source: When should I use inspir first?
entries.value: ମୁଁ କେବେ ପ୍ରଥମେ inspir ବ୍ୟବହାର କରିବି?

entries.source: When to use
entries.value: କେବେ ବ୍ୟବହାର କରିବେ

entries.source: When to use {value1}, and when to open inspir.
entries.value: {value1} କେବେ ବ୍ୟବହାର କରିବେ, ଏବଂ କେବେ inspir ଖୋଲିବେ।

entries.source: Why make comparison pages at all?
entries.value: ମୋଟେ ତୁଳନା ପୃଷ୍ଠା କାହିଁକି ତିଆରି କରିବେ?

entries.source: Yes. A good workflow is to learn the foundation from a trusted lesson source, then use inspir to ask follow-up questions, practise recall, repair misconceptions, and plan what to review next.
entries.value: Yes. A good କାର୍ଯ୍ୟପ୍ରବାହ ହେଉଛି କୁ ଶିଖନ୍ତୁ the foundation ରୁ a trusted lesson source, then ବ୍ୟବହାର inspir କୁ ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ follow-up ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ, practise ସ୍ମରଣ, repair ଭୁଲ ଧାରଣା, ଓ ଯୋଜନା କ’ଣ କୁ ସମୀକ୍ଷା ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ.
